response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior/staff full-stack engineer with strong craftsmanship, testing culture, and some distributed-systems exposure, but the role's hard requirement of 8 years of C++ is not met — C++ appears only briefly at National Instruments (~6 months) and an academic thesis. Primary languages are TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, and there is no evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or large-scale infrastructure ownership at the required depth.
strengths: Long senior/staff-level career with strong TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship background
Some distributed/high-throughput experience at Dunnhumby (microservices handling millions of req/s)
Mentorship and community teaching track record (workshops, courses, dojos)
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ requirement — only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale infrastructure leadership experience
No formal technical-lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers on a platform team

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform leadership
